title: lowercase
description: a simple pack that makes all text lowercase. yes, even the one on the tnt block.
body:
a simple resourcepack for those who don't like capital/uppercase letters.

# quick info

this pack works with any mod & resourcepack, just make sure to put it above all the others.

for now only languages using the english alphabet and without accents are supported, but i plan on expanding the pack to other languages.

# disclaimer

i made this resourcepack by replacing all capital letters in the font texture with lowercase ones. this means that all instances of uppercase letters are affected, including the ones appering in chat. this method grants a huge compatibility value at the cost of any and all capital letters in the game.
